title: drymoglossum ellipticum
intro: Drymoglossum ellipticum, also known as the elliptical creeping fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical forests in Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Drymoglossum ellipticum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
